hero.headline:
Your Pool, Personally Cared For by
the Owners
hero.subheadline: Quinn and Mackenzie personally service every single pool -- no subcontractors, no rotating crews, no strangers in your backyard. Just a family team that knows your pool by name, shows up on schedule, and treats your property with the same respect they give their own.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Tiered Pool Care Plans<br class="hidden md:block"> That Fit Your Life
services.subtitle: Whether you want expert chemistry management or full hands-off maintenance, we have a plan that matches your needs and budget -- all backed by owner-level attention every single week.

cards.title: Chemical Treatment
cards.description: Weekly water testing, chemical balancing, and basket cleaning for the hands-on pool owner who wants expert chemistry without the guesswork. Starting at $90/month.

cards.title: Chemical + Brush Service
cards.description: Everything in Chemical Treatment plus weekly tile cleaning and thorough wall and step brushing. We handle the sweat work so your pool stays pristine. Starting at $120/month.

cards.title: Full Service Maintenance
cards.description: The complete package -- vacuuming, skimming, brushing, chemicals, filter care, and proactive equipment checks. Pure hands-off enjoyment. Starting at $160/month.

cards.title: Green to Clean Recovery
cards.description: Neglected pool turned swamp? Our multi-day restoration strategy brings it back to crystal-clear condition. One-time service starting at $250.

cards.title: Filter Cleaning & Repairs
cards.description: Thorough filter cleaning every 3-4 months for optimal performance, plus equipment repairs and installations from minor plumbing to full automation setups.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Service
cards.description: Certified operators serving hotels, HOAs, and high-traffic facilities across South Orange County. Reliable, professional maintenance your tenants and guests can count on.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Pool
steps.description: Call or text Quinn directly. He will visit your property, evaluate your pool's condition, and recommend the right service tier -- no pressure, no upselling, just honest advice.

steps.title: We Show Up, Every Week
steps.description: Quinn and Mackenzie personally arrive on your scheduled day. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks -- everything handled by the owners who stake their name on the results.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard Again
steps.description: Your pool stays swim-ready and sparkling. Spend your weekends in the water, not working on it. If something is ever off, one call to Quinn and it is made right.

about.label: Why Pool Owners Choose Us
about.headline: A Family Team That Shows Up Personally -- Every Single Week
about.description: Procter Pools is Quinn and Mackenzie Procter -- a husband-and-wife team who have called Southern California home for nearly 15 years. Unlike larger companies that send different technicians each visit, we personally maintain every pool on our route. You will never wonder who is in your backyard. We are proud members of the Swimming Pool Service Pro Association and committed to transparent pricing, respectful property care, and the kind of personal service that only a family business can deliver.

features.title: Owner-Operated, Every Visit
features.description: Quinn and Mackenzie personally service your pool. No subcontractors, no rotating crews -- just the owners who built this business on trust.

features.title: Transparent Pricing, Always
features.description: Every service is clearly priced upfront. No hidden fees, no surprise charges, no bait-and-switch. You know exactly what you are paying for.

features.title: Your Property, Respected
features.description: We treat your home like our own. Gates closed, deck area tidied, equipment left clean. You will never know we were there -- except for the sparkling pool.

pricing.headline: Clear Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Plans starting at $90/month. Choose the tier that fits your lifestyle -- upgrade, downgrade, or adjust anytime. Quinn will recommend exactly what your pool needs, nothing more.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Promise
guarantee.description: If you are ever unsatisfied with a service visit, call Quinn directly and he will personally return to make it right at no additional charge. As owners who service every pool themselves, our reputation is on the line with every visit -- and we would not have it any other way. Your satisfaction is not just a policy, it is the foundation of our family business.

faqs.question: How quickly can I get on your schedule?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within the same week. Quinn will visit your property for a free evaluation and can often begin regular service within days. Call or text us directly at 949-994-8219.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you are away. After each visit, you will know exactly what was done and how your pool is looking.

faqs.question: Who actually services my pool?
faqs.answer: Quinn and Mackenzie -- the owners. Period. We do not subcontract, we do not send employees, and we do not rotate technicians. The same people who answer your call are the same people cleaning your pool every week.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve communities across South Orange County including Trabuco Canyon, Mission Viejo, Coto de Caza, Ladera Ranch, Lake Forest, Rancho Santa Margarita, Irvine, Laguna Niguel, San Clemente, and surrounding areas.

faqs.question: Do you handle commercial properties?
faqs.answer: Yes. We are certified commercial pool operators serving hotels, HOAs, and multi-family properties. Commercial clients receive the same owner-level attention and reliability as our residential customers.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: Quinn is incredibly thorough and professional. Our pool has never looked better since switching to Procter Pools. They show up on time every week and always leave the area spotless.

testimonials.name: David R.
testimonials.context: Green to Clean Service, Coto de Caza
testimonials.text: We had a green pool after being away for a month and Quinn had it crystal clear within days. Honest pricing and great communication throughout the process.

testimonials.name: Jennifer L.
testimonials.text: As a new pool owner, I appreciate how Quinn takes the time to explain everything about our pool's chemistry and equipment. True family-owned service with a personal touch.

contact.subtitle: Text or call Quinn directly for a free pool evaluation. No contracts, no pressure -- just honest recommendations from the people who will personally care for your pool every week.
benefits: Direct line to Quinn, the owner
